info.title: Midnight Node JSON-RPC API
info.description: JSON-RPC API for the Midnight privacy blockchain node. Custom methods provide access to the privacy ledger, governance parameters, and peer management. Standard Substrate methods are also listed.

methods.name: midnight_contractState
methods.summary: Returns the state of a deployed contract.
methods.description: The contract is identified by its hex-encoded address. The returned state is also hex-encoded. Queries run against the best block unless `at` specifies a historical block hash.

params.name: at
params.description: Block hash to query at (defaults to best block)

methods.name: midnight_zswapStateRoot
methods.summary: Returns the Merkle root of the zswap (shielded transaction) state tree.
methods.description: The root is returned as a byte array. If `at` is null, the best block is used.

params.name: at
params.description: Block hash to query at (defaults to best block)

methods.name: midnight_ledgerStateRoot
methods.summary: Returns the Merkle root of the overall ledger state.
methods.description: The root is returned as a byte array. If `at` is null, the best block is used.

params.name: at
params.description: Block hash to query at (defaults to best block)

methods.name: midnight_apiVersions
methods.summary: Returns the RPC API version(s) supported by this node.
methods.description: The returned array currently contains a single element ([2]). This is the RPC protocol version, distinct from the runtime API version.

methods.name: midnight_ledgerVersion
methods.summary: Returns the ledger implementation version string.
methods.description: If `at` is null, the best block is used.

params.name: at
params.description: Block hash to query at (defaults to best block)

methods.name: systemParameters_getTermsAndConditions
methods.summary: Get the current Terms and Conditions.
methods.description: Returns the hash and URL of the current terms and conditions, or null if not set.

params.name: at
params.description: Block hash to query at (defaults to best block)

methods.name: systemParameters_getDParameter
methods.description: Returns the number of permissioned and registered candidates.

params.name: at
params.description: Block hash to query at (defaults to best block)

methods.name: systemParameters_getAriadneParameters
methods.summary: Get Ariadne parameters for a given mainchain epoch.
methods.description: Returns permissioned candidates and candidate registrations from Cardano, with the D Parameter sourced from pallet-system-parameters on-chain storage. Preferred over sidechain_getAriadneParameters.

params.name: epoch_number
params.description: Mainchain epoch number to query candidates for

params.name: d_parameter_at
params.description: Block hash to query D Parameter from (defaults to best block)

methods.name: network_peerReputations
methods.summary: Returns reputation info for all connected peers.
methods.description: Lists all connected peers with their reputation score and ban status.

methods.name: network_peerReputation
methods.summary: Returns reputation info for a single peer.
methods.description: Looks up a peer by its base58-encoded peer ID.

methods.name: network_unbanPeer
methods.summary: Unbans a peer by boosting its reputation above the ban threshold.
methods.description: Requires the node to be started with --rpc-methods=unsafe.

methods.name: sidechain_getParams
methods.description: Returns the genesis UTXO that uniquely identifies this partner chain.

methods.name: sidechain_getStatus
methods.description: Returns current epoch/slot information for both the partner chain and Cardano mainchain.

methods.name: sidechain_getEpochCommittee
methods.summary: Get the validator committee for a sidechain epoch.
methods.description: Returns the ordered list of validators selected for the specified epoch.

methods.name: sidechain_getRegistrations
methods.summary: Get SPO registrations for a mainchain epoch.
methods.description: Returns Stake Pool Operator registration records for committee candidacy.

methods.name: sidechain_getAriadneParameters
methods.summary: Get Ariadne parameters for a mainchain epoch.
methods.description: Returns permissioned candidates, registrations, and D Parameter sourced from Cardano. Deprecated: use systemParameters_getAriadneParameters instead.

TermsAndConditionsRpcResponse.title: TermsAndConditionsRpcResponse
TermsAndConditionsRpcResponse.description: Terms and Conditions response for RPC

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the terms and conditions document (0x-prefixed hex, 32 bytes)

url.description: URL where the terms and conditions can be found

AriadneParametersRpcResponse.title: AriadneParametersRpcResponse
AriadneParametersRpcResponse.description:
Ariadne parameters response

Returns the same schema as `sidechain_getAriadneParameters` but with D Parameter sourced from pallet-system-parameters instead of Cardano.

Note: `permissioned_candidates` and `candidate_registrations` use `serde_json::Value`, producing permissive schemas. The actual structures correspond to `PermissionedCandidateData` and `GetRegistrationsResponseMap` from partner-chains.

candidateRegistrations.description: Map of candidate registrations from Cardano

permissionedCandidates.description: List of permissioned candidates from Cardano. None signifies a list was not set on mainchain.

PeerReputationInfo.description: Peer information enriched with reputation and ban status

roles.description: Roles advertised by the peer (e.g. FULL)

bestHash.description: Best block hash known for this peer (0x-prefixed hex)

bestNumber.description: Best block number known for this peer

isBanned.description: Whether the peer is currently banned

GetCommitteeResponse.description: Committee members for a sidechain epoch

CandidateRegistrationEntry.description: SPO registration entry for committee candidacy

invalidReasons.description: Present only when isValid is false

data.description: Variants: BadContractAddress, BadAccountAddress, UnableToGetContractState, UnableToGetZSwapChainState, UnableToGetZSwapStateRoot, UnableToGetLedgerStateRoot
Variants: UnableToGetBlock, BlockNotFound, UnableToGetLedgerState, UnableToDecodeTransactions, UnableToSerializeBlock, UnableToGetChainVersion
Custom error from partner-chains sidechain RPC
